story.text:
# ✨ Enforce Commitment
**📖 → ⛓️(deploy) → 🔒(enforce) → 📊(verify)**
*adamantia · etherchanting · V51*

Enforce a programmable commitment on-chain. The contract is what the chain holds; the language is what the city reads.

> Enforcement is a written promise the city can verify. What the chain holds, the language remembers.

*Keywords:* enforce · commitment · on-chain · v51
